summary: Completed frontend E2E testing of all login flows for HyperServe. All 3 login flows (Customer, Tenant Admin, Super Admin) working correctly with auto-role detection based on phone number. Fixed missing Toaster component in App.js to display OTP toast notifications.

fixed.issue: Toaster component was not included in App.js, causing toast notifications (including OTP display) to not be visible
fixed.fix: Added import for Toaster from @/components/ui/toaster and included <Toaster /> component inside BrowserRouter

test_credentials.note: OTP is returned in send-otp API response and displayed in toast notification

context_for_next_testing_agent: All login flows verified working. Role auto-detection based on phone number is functioning correctly: 9999999999=super_admin, 8888888888=tenant_admin, others=customer. Toast notifications now visible after adding Toaster component to App.js. Protected routes correctly redirect to /login when unauthenticated. JWT tokens and user data properly stored in localStorage after successful login.

protected_routes.details: All protected routes (/customer, /tenant-admin, /super-admin) redirect to /login when unauthenticated

toast_notification.details: OTP toast notification visible after fix - shows 'OTP Sent' with OTP value

role_dropdown_removed.details: No role dropdown found on login page - auto-detection is in place
